issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' with type '{Galley-La Company}', not 'HasRestingDon'. The effect requires the Leader to have the Galley-La Company type.
Action should be 'AttachDon' (attaching/resting DON!! from deck), not 'GiveDon'. The card adds DON!! from deck and rests it (attaches it).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] If your Leader has the {Galley-La Company} type, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
